task_completion.description: Navigate to the configuration or modification page for the 'SALESTEAM' campaign.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the campaign administration or modification screen with the Campaign ID 'SALESTEAM' clearly visible and selected.

task_completion.description: Enter the exact Web Form URL with the required variable syntax.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Web Form' input field contains exactly: https://crm.example.com/view?lead_id=--A--vendor_lead_code--B--
The 'Web Form Target' input field contains exactly: _blank

task_completion.description: Enter the exact Dispo Call URL with the required variable syntax.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Dispo Call URL' input field contains exactly: https://api.middleware.com/log_call?phone=--A--phone_number--B--&status=--A--dispo--B--&agent=--A--user--B--
A success message indicating the campaign was modified, or the form is shown reloaded with the newly entered values persisting in their respective fields.

integrity.description: The agent used the web application's graphical user interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the administration panel, rather than a terminal window executing SQL commands or curl requests.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual dialer/CRM administration software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches a genuine web application form (e.g., Vicidial admin interface) and not a local text editor or a generic note-taking app.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the browser's 'Inspect Element' or Developer Tools being open to manipulate the DOM text directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target campaign ID is 'SALESTEAM'. The expected Web Form URL is exactly 'https://crm.example.com/view?lead_id=--A--vendor_lead_code--B--'. The expected Web Form Target is exactly '_blank'. The expected Dispo Call URL is exactly 'https://api.middleware.com/log_call?phone=--A--phone_number--B--&status=--A--dispo--B--&agent=--A--user--B--'.
